summary: iter248 — Late USDT deposit hash submission. Full backend pytest (6 passed, 1 skipped) + full frontend E2E PASSED. Both flows (in-form post-deposit hash + late-hash modal from transaction history) work end-to-end. PATCH /api/wallet/deposit/{tx_id}/hash validates 16-200 chars, ownership, status=pending, USDT-only deposits. Idempotent. Frontend correctly removed the pre-init Hash field, shows address + hash block AFTER 'Continuer →', and exposes '+ Soumettre le hash' CTA on pending USDT txs without a hash.
critical_code_review_comments: wallet.py:1714 — `is_usdt_manual` matches notes substring 'USDT' (case-insensitive). This is correct because `notes` is built as `[USDT (TRC20) manuel] {user_notes}` at deposit creation. However, if a user later types 'USDT' in their own notes for a NowPayments deposit, the check could falsely allow a hash submission. Consider matching the structured prefix `[USDT (TRC` instead of substring 'USDT' for stricter isolation.

wallet.py:1719 — UPDATE writes `tx_hash[:255]` even though the request validator rejects >200 chars; the [:255] truncation is dead defensive code (harmless). Reference column may have a smaller cap; consider aligning.

Idempotency works because the same hash → same UPDATE result. But if the user submits a NEW different hash on a still-pending deposit, the route silently overwrites the previous reference. This is by design (per spec) but undocumented in API response — consider returning `previous_hash` for audit trail.

WalletPage.js — late-hash CTA is shown for any pending USDT deposit with empty/short reference. Verified visually: 3 pending txs all show CTA. After submit, the row hides the CTA correctly (reload-driven, not optimistic).
Login is very slow on the preview environment (~50-60s end-to-end) because of bcrypt + brute-force hardening. Tests required 120s timeouts. Not a regression — pre-existing infra characteristic.

success_rate.backend: 100% (6/6 testable, 1 skipped due to no non-USDT pending tx for Alice)

seed_data_creation: Created several pending USDT TRC20 deposits for Alice during testing (3 still visible in history at end with late-hash CTA). All amounts $5. Notes contain 'test iter248' or 'iter248-non-usdt'. Safe to leave (kept pending; admin has not credited).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter248 frontend + backend BOTH fully validated. Endpoint at PATCH /api/wallet/deposit/{tx_id}/hash. Auth via Bearer token (Authorization header) bypasses CSRF. Login on preview is slow (~60s) — use 120s timeouts. Captcha bypass via API: captcha_id=JAPAP_E2E_BYPASS_2026, captcha_answer='0'. UI captcha is a math problem, parse with regex `(\d+)\s*([+\-*])\s*(\d+)\s*=`. WalletPage data-testids: deposit-button, confirm-deposit-button, deposit-address, copy-deposit-address, post-deposit-hash-block/input/submit/confirmed, late-hash-cta-{tx_id}, late-hash-modal/input/submit/cancel.
rca of the issue: n/a — no bugs found. Implementation matches the iter248 spec exactly.
